findings.evidence: `nl -ba .../RegularTorsor.lean` shows line 44 `@[reducible, expose]`, with the body at lines 48-50; the new API includes `fiber_sdiv_eq_deckEquivFiber_symm`, `deckEquivFiber_symm_eq_sdiv`, and `fiberMap_sdiv_eq_conjMulEquiv`, so consumers need not unfold the definition.
findings.fix: Remove `expose`; keep the body hidden and add any missing rewrite lemma instead of requiring consumers to unfold the definition.
findings.issue: `fiberTorsor` is changed to `@[reducible, expose]`, exposing the body `fiberTorsorOfPretransitive` to downstream users even though the PR supplies public characteristic lemmas for division and transport.

summary: The transport lemmas give the needed characteristic API, but the PR unnecessarily exposes the implementation body of the regular fibre torsor.
